0.details:
express condolences to friend on the passing of her loved one
reminisce on good times past with the loved one
explain that if she needs me, i'm here for her
re-express condolences
0.model_generation:
My dear friend,

I was so saddened to hear of your loved one’s passing. They had such a bright spirit and a gentle kindness that touched everyone around them. I’ll always remember our weekend picnics by the lake, laughing as we grilled burgers and watched the sunset. Their warm laugh, sense of humor, and caring heart made every moment special. I wish I could go back to those carefree days and remind them how much they meant to all of us.

Please know I’m here for you in any way you need—whether it’s a shoulder to lean on, a quiet evening together, or someone to talk with late at night. I’m only a call away whenever you need me. You don’t have to face this alone.

I am so sorry for your loss. My thoughts and prayers are with your family during this difficult time.

With deepest sympathy and love,
0.final_version:
My dear friend,

I was so saddened to hear of your grandma's passing. She had such a bright spirit and a gentle kindness that touched everyone around her, including me. I’ll always remember our weekend picnics by the lake, laughing as we grilled burgers and watched the sunset. Her warm laugh, sense of humour, and caring heart made every moment special. I wish I could go back to those carefree days and remind her how much they meant to all of us.

Please know I’m here for you in any way you need—whether it’s a shoulder to lean on, a quiet evening together, or someone to talk with late at night. I’m only a call away whenever you need me. You don’t have to face this alone.

I am so sorry again for your loss. My thoughts and prayers are with your family during this difficult time.

With deepest sympathy and love,

1.details:
old friend's name and relationship to me
reason why I am writing the letter
reminisce on old times
talk about how her qualities have impacted my life, and how I will use these qualities to move forward in life.
1.model_generation:
Dear Emily,

I hope this letter finds you well. I’ve been thinking about our college days and wanted to reconnect. Moving for my new job has kept me busy, but I often remember our late-night study sessions, cheering on the football team, and our endless coffee breaks. Your unwavering empathy and determination inspired me then and continue to guide me now. You showed me how to stay positive in stressful times and to push through challenges with grace. As I settle into this new chapter, I’m relying on the perseverance and kindness you taught me. Your friendship helped me believe in myself, and I carry that confidence into every new opportunity. I miss our long walks around campus and your infectious laugh. Until then, know that you’re always in my thoughts. I’d love to hear what’s new in your life and catch up properly. Let’s plan a call soon!

Take care,
Jordan
1.final_version:
Dear Emily,

I hope this letter finds you well. I’ve been thinking about our college days and wanted to reconnect. 
Moving for my new job has kept me busy, but I often remember our late-night study sessions( with lots of snacks between us), cheering on the football team, and our endless coffee breaks. Your unwavering empathy and determination inspired me then, and continue to guide me now. You showed me how to stay positive in stressful times and to push through challenges with grace.
 As I settle into this new chapter, I’m relying on the perseverance and kindness you taught me over the years. Your friendship helped me believe in myself, and I carry that confidence into every new opportunity. I miss our long walks around campus and your infectious laugh. 
Until then, know that you’re always in my thoughts. I’d love to hear what’s new in your life and catch up properly. Let’s plan a call soon!

Take care,
Jordan

2.details:
whose birthday- my grandfather turning 90
talk about a few childhood memories of fun and life lessons
explain why i respect him and the great qualities he possess
Talk about the joy he continues to bring to everyone around him in his golden years
2.model_generation: Grandfather, today we celebrate your 90 years of wisdom, laughter, and unwavering kindness. I remember summer afternoons chasing fireflies in your garden, your guidance as you taught me to ride a bike, and the stories you shared at dusk that filled my imagination. From you, I learned the value of patience when you helped me master counting chores and the strength in perseverance as you showed me how to rebuild a broken toy. I respect your honesty, generous spirit, and your ability to find joy in every moment. Your laughter fills the room, and your warm embrace brings comfort to all of us. In these golden years, you continue to inspire with your curiosity, love for family dinners, and playful jokes that light up every gathering. Thank you for being a pillar of strength, a source of endless affection, and a beacon of joy. Happy 90th birthday!
2.final_version:
Grandfather Toby, 
Today we celebrate your 90 years of wisdom, laughter, and unwavering kindness. I remember summer afternoons chasing fireflies in your garden, your guidance as you taught me to ride a bike, and the stories you shared at dusk that filled my imagination. From you, I learned the value of patience when you helped me master counting, and the strength in perseverance as you showed me how to rebuild a broken toy. I respect your honesty, generous spirit, and your ability to find joy in every moment. Your laughter fills the room, and your warm embrace brings comfort to all of us. In these golden years, you continue to inspire with your curiosity, love for family dinners, and playful jokes that light up every gathering. Thank you for being a pillar of strength, a source of endless affection, and a beacon of joy. Happy 90th birthday!

3.details:
relationship of the deceased and myself- my beloved mom
Reminisce on our history from my youth and how she, as a single mother, gave me her best
Talk about her zest for life and how this has shaped me into the young woman I am, and how I will carry these positive traits forward in life.
3.model_generation:
My mom was a beacon of warmth and strength. Growing up, I watched her balance work and home, never letting me feel that we lacked. She taught me resilience, turning long hours and tight budgets into lessons in creativity and hope. Her laughter filled our apartment on Saturday mornings, and her curiosity led us on picnics and stargazing nights.

Her zest for life was contagious. She sang while cooking dinner, danced in the living room, and greeted every sunrise with gratitude. Because of her, I learned to embrace challenges with humor, find joy in simple moments, and treat every person with kindness. Today, as a young woman stepping into the world she prepared me for, I always carry her courage and compassion in my heart. Though she is gone, her spirit lives on in every dream I chase. I will honor her legacy by living fully, as she taught me.
3.final_version:
My mom was a beacon of warmth and strength. Growing up, I watched her balance work and home, never letting me feel that we lacked. She taught me resilience, turning long hours and tight budgets into lessons of creativity and hope. Her laughter filled our home on everyday, and her curiosity led us on picnics and stargazing nights.

Her zest for life was contagious. She sang while cooking dinner, danced in the living room, and greeted every sunrise with gratitude. Because of her, I learned to embrace challenges with humor, find joy in simple moments, and treat every person with kindness. Today, as a young woman stepping into the world she prepared me for, I always carry her courage and compassion in my heart. Though she is gone, her spirit lives on in every dream I chase. I will honour her legacy by living fully, as she taught me.

4.details:
name of my partner- Jax
call to mind exactly how we met- on the local trail and one conversation turned into many months of growing love and laughter
express how after three years, our love has cemented and we are now truly soul mates, the other half of each other, because of how we have matured together.
4.model_generation: Jax, from the moment our paths crossed on that winding forest trail and one conversation grew into months of laughter, I knew something extraordinary was beginning. Over the past three years, you’ve been my compass and my confidant, guiding me through joy and challenge with unwavering love and warmth. Today I promise to treasure every step we take together, to nurture the bond that has cemented our souls as one, and to celebrate the growth that has shaped us into the perfect halves of a single heart. I vow to listen with patience, to speak with honesty, and to support your dreams as if they were my own. I pledge to fill our days with humor and hope, to stand by you in every season, and to keep discovering new trails hand in hand. With all that I am and all that I will become, I choose you now and always.
4.final_version:
My sweet Jax

Words cannot describe how immeasurably happy I am today to be standing here with you, getting married. I can clearly remember the very first time we met. We were both running on the Tiny River Trail when our eyes met. We had a very warm laughter and a brief wave; this was the beginning of many more months of fun, joy and peace, that I have never experienced with another before.
Now three years later, and I can truly say, we are ready. Ready for the next chapter, ready for many more years of happiness and ready for the unseen, for we will face it together; just as we have before. We are now truly soul mates, cemented together by the experiences of life that we have been through. 

As we take this plunge, may the love we have and share, give us strength and unwavering fortitude, for the future.

5.details:
name of family- Nina
what went wrong- She approached me with a biased statement at a family gathering
I snapped at her and brought up an embarrassing past occurrence that no one else knew about
reiterate my apology and offer to make amends
5.model_generation:
Dear Nina,

I want to sincerely apologize for my behavior at our recent family gathering. When you approached me with that biased statement, I lost my temper and unfairly snapped at you. In a moment of anger, I brought up a private and embarrassing event from your past that no one else knew about, and I deeply regret revealing something so personal.

My words were hurtful and disrespectful, and I understand how they must have affected you. Please know that I take full responsibility for my actions and the distress I caused.

I value our relationship and am committed to making amends. I would appreciate the chance to speak with you in person, listen to how my actions hurt you, and work together to rebuild trust and understanding.

Thank you for considering my apology. I hope we can move forward with the respect and kindness our family deserves.

Sincerely,
5.final_version:
Dear Nina

I am reaching out with this letter in apology for my action at our family dinner last week. I have been thinking about my actions since then and am feeling very emotional since then.You had approached me in front of everyone and accused me of not being there for the family more. In my anger, I brought up the fact that I bailed you out a few months back when you were facing eviction. No one else in the family was aware of this.

I immediately felt bad and wanted to apologize but you had ran out and left. My action were not good. I am deeply sorry that I had placed you in that position. We have been very close cousins growing up, and i feel like I have jeopardized it. Please forgive me. I hope I can make it up to you soon.
 with love, Emily

post_survey.present_other: my genuine feelings are mostly what matter.
